company: Underdog.io -Apply to top tech jobs in 60 seconds. A place where companies apply to you
strengths: Production ELT pipelines with Airflow and dbt
weaknesses: Limited explicit experience with vector stores/embeddings
No clear production experience with feature stores
Less tenure than requested (≈3 years post-grad/product roles)
Limited explicit AI/ML model deployment work
improvement_bullets: Refactored raw web-scraped unstructured data into structured schemas using Python, leveraging LLM-based embeddings to power downstream semantic search and retrieval workflows.
Engineered a feature store concept within BigQuery, transforming complex multi-unit franchise metrics into reusable AI-ready features to accelerate model development.
Integrated vector search capabilities into data pipelines to support AI-agent decision-making, ensuring high-quality, relevant data retrieval for end-user insights.
Designed and implemented robust data observability frameworks to monitor pipeline health, effectively managing unstructured and semi-structured data sources to ensure consistent reliability.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Engineer opportunity with the platform. I am interested in this opportunity because the prospect of building an agentic AI platform to solve the fragmented data landscape of the franchise industry aligns perfectly with my background in data engineering and my passion for building AI-ready infrastructure. What interests me about working for your company is its innovative approach to automating the franchise lifecycle; the ambition to create a data-driven competitive moat through AI agents deeply intrigues me because of my experience in transforming raw, complex data into actionable, automated workflows. I believe my proficiency in building end-to-end ELT pipelines and my experience in data-centric feature engineering would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on high-ownership and scalability. In fact, while building an economic batch pipeline for FRED data, I architected a dbt-based star schema in BigQuery and integrated Great Expectations to automate data quality validation, which significantly reduced query times for stakeholders. Ultimately, I know that the Data Engineer role would allow me to bring my expertise in data modeling and automated pipelines to build the foundational architecture that powers your AI agents. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my skills in translating user feedback into production-grade systems. I collaborated with engineers to extract data from REST APIs, reducing UI bugs and improving data accuracy by 60%, providing me the foundation to build end-to-end features and frontend experiences as described in your requirements. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python and cloud-native data architecture to work on the industry knowledge graph at your company. I know that my technical rigor in data quality and my bias for action align with what it takes to succeed as a Data Engineer. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
